location: On a sitting corpse atop a siege/archery tower near the First Mt. Gelmir Campsite Site of Grace, north of Gelmir Hero's Grave.

source.name: corpse pickup, archery tower near First Mt. Gelmir Campsite

tactics: Reach Mt. Gelmir via the rope-ladder path up from northern Altus Plateau to First Mt. Gelmir Campsite grace
Look for the tall archery/siege tower near the campsite and climb it to the top for the corpse
Watch for Abductor Virgins patrolling the cliffside approach — their grab attack is an instant kill if it connects
lore: A mechanically intricate longbow rigged with pulleys and a doubled string, its construction demanding real mathematical and engineering skill — built to send arrows farther and truer than an ordinary bow.

builds.name: Quality Str/Dex bow
builds.why: One of the only bows with D-grade Strength scaling instead of the usual E, plus extended range — fits a Str/Dex quality build better than most bows
